name: Hidden Valley Ranch Dressing Mix/Dressing
recipeIngredient: Parsley flakes, dried (Dry minced parsley flakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the powdered crackers through a blender on high speed until fully powdered.
2. Add the parsley flakes, onion flakes, and dill weed to the blender. Blend again until fully powdered.
3. Stir in the onion salt, garlic salt, onion powder, and garlic powder.
4. Place the mixture into a container with a tight-fitting lid.
5. Store at room temperature for up to 1 year.
6. To use: Combine 1 tablespoon of mix, 1 cup of mayo, and 1 cup of buttermilk.
7. Yield: 1 pint.
Source: Gloria Pitzer
